title: No More Breaking Trees
description: Instantly break entire trees in Minecraft! Gather wood faster and make survival gameplay smoother with this lightweight Spigot plugin.
body:
Tired of waiting forever to chop down trees in Minecraft? No More Breaking Trees lets you cut down logs instantly! With this plugin, players can break entire trees quickly and effortlessly, making wood gathering fast and fun again.

   Website: https://nomorebreakingtrees.web.app/
